name_en: 🆕 【Top Quality】M25649 👏👏 The elegant 'Portouille Victorine' finished in timeless dreamy beige transcends seasons. Using Maison's single monogram unplant leather, it updates the Savoie project (craftsmanship) with bright gold accessories. Dimensions: 12 x 9.5 x 2.5 cm
